title: Luminarc Pot Club Jar with Lid 1.5L, 1Piece - Transparent
features: THE GLASS JAR WITH VINTAGE PETIT AIR: You can recognize at first glance the glass jars of the Club line. With their little vintage air, they bring a decorative touch to your kitchen, while protecting and preserving dry products, such as rice, pasta, cereals, flour...

TOTAL AIRSEAL: The lid with seal allows you to keep your dry products safely and securely in place. The glass jar is as useful as it is aesthetically pleasing in the kitchen, but also in the bathroom, to show off your colourful bath salts and fancy cotton balls in a chic way.
PERFECT HEALTHY: The silicone lids and gaskets are BPA free and therefore safe for your health. Non-porous, the jar does not retain any microorganisms that can contaminate food.

THE MOST BEAUTIFUL ALTERNATIVES TO PLASTICS: With vintage glass jars, keep all your dry products purchased in bulk. No need for unnecessary packaging, Club jars can be used and reused for a long time, especially since they are dishwasher safe without problems. There are 7 different pots, to suit all your decoration and storage needs.

LUMINARC, FEEL CREATIVE: For decades, Luminarc has translated the French art of living into shapes, patterns and colours that shape dishes that are always current and easy to live with. Trendy and clever, creativity made in Luminarc invites itself today more than ever to vote table.
description: This Luminarch Potclub jar is the perfect addition to kitchen counters. The non-toughened glass displays the contents perfectly, making these jars perfect for displaying sweets, cookies or even pasta.
